query:
-- Verificar cartão de fidelidade do cliente
SELECT lc.id, lc.customerPhone, lc.stamps, lc.totalStampsEarned, lc.couponsEarned, lc.activeCouponId
FROM loyaltyCards lc
WHERE lc.customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%';

-- Verificar todos os cupons de fidelidade criados para este cliente
SELECT c.id, c.code, c.type, c.value, c.quantity, c.usedCount, c.isActive, c.loyaltyCardId, c.createdAt
FROM coupons c
WHERE c.loyaltyCardId IN (
  SELECT id FROM loyaltyCards WHERE customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%'
)
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC;

-- Verificar histórico de carimbos
SELECT ls.id, ls.loyaltyCardId, ls.orderId, ls.orderNumber, ls.orderTotal, ls.createdAt
FROM loyaltyStamps ls
WHERE ls.loyaltyCardId IN (
  SELECT id FROM loyaltyCards WHERE customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%'
)
ORDER BY ls.createdAt DESC;
